title: Analytics - Location Permission Granted
scenario: Verify that granting location permission logs the "location_permission_granted" event in Firebase and that the dashboard reflects the updated event count after a few hours.
steps: Open the Location Permission Granted Firebase page and verify it loads with default elements and success status.
Allow or deny location access on mobile; after a few hours, the event count for related elements should increase.
expected: The event \"location_permission_granted\" is tracked in Firebase. Default dashboard elements include a graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
